title: lycopodium × issleri
intro: Lycopodium × issleri is a hybrid species of the Lycopodium genus, resulting from the cross between Lycopodium clavatum and Lycopodium annotinum. It is a type of club moss, a vascular plant with spore-producing structures that are often used in herbal medicine. Lycopodium × issleri has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Lycopodium × issleri, often in the form of tinctures or infusions, can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
